title: How to design a multi-agent system that skips the LLM
summary: Casey West demonstrates a multi-agent system design that avoids unnecessary LLM calls by using deterministic logic and the before_model_callback trick. A 1000-agent marathon planning system shows how to route agents with code-based decisions rather than LLM inference, scaling with stateless sessions on Redis.
